output.summary: Replace MediaUpload/ImageDropUploader icon approach in WideSocialMediaItem with IconPicker component pattern from FooterInfoSocialItem. Add iconSlug attribute, copy 12 SVG resource files, update TSX to use IconPicker with suggested social media icons, update PHP to resolve iconSlug SVGs (prioritized over logoId), and keep backward compatibility with existing logoId media library uploads.

fileChanges.details: Add "iconSlug": { "type": "string" } to attributes object. Keep existing logoId attribute for backward compatibility.

1. Remove imports: MediaUpload, MediaReplaceFlow, ImageDropUploader, ImageOrInlineSvg, fetchMedia. 2. Add imports: IconPicker, SuggestedIcon from @taktdev/components, cn from @taktdev/utilities. 3. Add 12 SVG ReactComponent imports from ./resources/icon-*.svg (same as FooterInfoSocialItem). 4. Add suggestedIcons array with same 12 icons (bluesky, facebook, facebook-alt, imdb, instagram, linkedin, pinterest, threads, tiktok, vimeo, x, youtube). 5. Add iconSlug to WideSocialMediaItemAttributes type. 6. Replace the icon <span> content: remove the logo ternary with ImageOrInlineSvg/ImageDropUploader, replace with <IconPicker value={iconPickerValue} onChange={...} suggestedIcons={suggestedIcons} iconSize={24} />. 7. Compute iconPickerValue from attributes.iconSlug or attributes.logoId (slug priority). 8. In onChange handler, set both iconSlug and logoId (clearing the other). 9. Remove InspectorControls PanelBody for Media upload. 10. Remove MediaReplaceFlow and trash toolbar buttons from BlockControls. 11. Remove fetchMedia(attributes.logoId) call and logo variable. 12. Keep hasIcon boolean based on iconSlug || logoId.

fileChanges.description: Add iconSlug resolution with priority over logoId
fileChanges.details: 1. Add @var string|null $iconSlug to docblock. 2. Before the existing logoId icon rendering, add iconSlug resolution block: if iconSlug is set, load SVG from __DIR__/resources/icon-{slug}.svg, strip XML declaration, output inline. 3. Only fall back to logoId/theme_output_svg_or_img if iconSlug is empty or file not found. 4. Pattern: exact same as FooterInfoSocialItem.php lines 30-39.

fileChanges.description: Copy all 12 SVG icon files from FooterInfoSocialItem/resources/
fileChanges.details: Copy all 12 icon-*.svg files from blocks/Footer/FooterInfo/FooterInfoSocial/FooterInfoSocialItem/resources/ to blocks/WideSocialMedia/WideSocialMediaItem/resources/. Files: icon-bluesky.svg, icon-facebook.svg, icon-facebook-alt.svg, icon-imdb.svg, icon-instagram.svg, icon-linkedin.svg, icon-pinterest.svg, icon-threads.svg, icon-tiktok.svg, icon-vimeo.svg, icon-x.svg, icon-youtube.svg.

attributeChanges.name: iconSlug
attributeChanges.description: Slug identifier for a suggested social media icon SVG (e.g. 'instagram', 'x', 'youtube'). When set, the corresponding SVG from resources/ is rendered instead of the media library logoId.

designDecisions.question: Should iconSlug take priority over logoId when both are set?
designDecisions.recommendation: Yes, iconSlug takes priority — same pattern as FooterInfoSocialItem. When user selects from IconPicker's suggested icons, iconSlug is set and logoId is cleared. When user uploads via media library through IconPicker, logoId is set and iconSlug is cleared. PHP renders iconSlug first, falls back to logoId.

designDecisions.question: Should the InspectorControls Media panel be removed entirely?
designDecisions.recommendation: Yes, remove it. The IconPicker component replaces both the media upload and icon selection functionality inline within the block. The FooterInfoSocialItem reference has no InspectorControls for media — all icon selection happens through the inline IconPicker.

designDecisions.question: Should the MediaReplaceFlow toolbar buttons be removed?
designDecisions.recommendation: Yes, remove MediaReplaceFlow and trash toolbar buttons from BlockControls. IconPicker handles its own replace/remove UI. The FooterInfoSocialItem reference only has the link toolbar button.

designDecisions.question: Should existing blocks with logoId still render correctly?
designDecisions.recommendation: Yes, backward compatibility is maintained. PHP falls back to logoId/theme_output_svg_or_img when iconSlug is empty. The TSX IconPicker also supports mediaId values, so existing logoId values will display correctly in the editor.

designDecisions.question: Should the icon wrapper classes and sizing change?
designDecisions.recommendation: Keep existing icon wrapper classes (w-6 h-6 shrink-0 *:w-6 *:h-6 *:object-contain *:object-center) and iconSize={24} for IconPicker. The WideSocialMediaItem already uses the same 24px icon size as FooterInfoSocialItem.
